p.underline: Re: Application to Postgraduate Admission - X. X.

text.p: Kindly refer to your letter of 2nd April, 1998, on the above subject. (A copy of the letter is attached.)

My attention has been drawn to the part of the letter which stipulates that Mr. ' s admission to the Ph.D (English) programme is conditional on my giving him a Letter of Release for postgraduate studies.

As you would be aware, Mr. is at present an Assistant Lecturer in the Department of English, and he certainly needs the training he would receive on the Ph.D. programme to be academically equipped for full participation in the work of the Department.
I therefore wish to inform you that I am prepared to release Mr. on a part-time basis for his Ph.D. work, and would greatly appreciate your completing the processing of his admission.
